parameters: Orc: Hello, this is a small town.

Orc: It's a town with nothing special, but please take
your time.
Red Dragon alert in effect―road currently closed.
Red Dragon alert in progress -road currently closed
It seems the Orc Red Dragon has been defeated.

Orc, congratulations on your marriage. I secretly
attended the ceremony too.

Orc, I heard you're about to have a child.
Congratulations.

Orc: Lately, the beasts getting horny at night and
mating have been so loud it's unbearable...
Orc: Hello, it's rare to see visitors from outside.
Orc: I'm a farmer. If you'd like, please have this.

Orc Phew... Farming is tough work, but growing
delicious vegetables is my reason for living.

"Orc, how's your pregnant wife doing? If you'd like,
please have this."

Orc Phew... Farming is tough work, but growing
delicious vegetables is my purpose in life.

Orc: We've cleaned up this place that was once a ruin
to make it this beautiful.

Slime: The monsters in this town are pacifists, you
know.

You can now use the magic circle to shortcut to the
base's coastline.
(＊Will be unlocked after clearing the tower)
You obtained a Fruit of Wisdom!
You obtained the Fruit of Wisdom!
You obtained the Fruit of Wisdom!
You obtained the Fruit of Wisdom!

Slime. It used to be called the Adventurer's Town,
where humans aiming to conquer dungeons lived.

"Ushi-kun, when your wife gets pregnant, I'll give you
a nice congratulatory gift♪ Let me know when that
happens."

Mrs. Ushi, congratulations on your pregnancy♪ Here,
take this.

"Dick... hehehe... satisfying a wife is also a man's
pride♪"

The church renovations are complete, and you can now
go inside! (Talk to the priest in the back to schedule
a ceremony.)
Wedding dresses are now available at the item shop!
